name: teepee
hints: Inside the teepee! Two treasures: the Sacred Tom Tom and Turquoise Necklace.
GET TOM and GET NECK for both treasures.
Bring both back to the Dry-Goods store (room 15).
GET TOM and GET NECK. N=hidden canyon (36).
